name: GoFetch
short_description: Who's a good dog? YOU ARE! In GoFetch you get to be the dog and get the ball. Race through different terrain and mazes in a variety of unique maps, get the ball and bring it back! Many different dogs with different colors!
detailed_description:
Who's a good dog? YOU ARE!

In GoFetch you get to be the dog and get the ball. Navigate through different terrain and mazes in a variety of unique maps, get the ball and bring it back! Multiple dogs can be unlocked, including:
  • Beagle
  • Border Collie
  • Bull Dog
  • Bull Terrier
  • Chihuahua
  • Doberman Pinscher
  • German Shepherd
  • Labrador Retriever
  • Poodle
  • Pug
  • Rhodesian Ridgeback
  • Saint Bernard

Race to find the ball in lots of fun places like the park, the snow, inside a volcano or even in outter space!

Why wait, get GoFetch today!

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
